meaning: n.灰狗,快速船,美国灰狗长途汽车
examples: In Norman England, the greyhound was a symbol of nobility.
I didn't fly. I took the Greyhound.
Selective breeding may result in a greyhound running faster and seeing better than a wolf.
Western Greyhound said government cuts to public transport funding were affecting operators and passengers.
Bus company Western Greyhound said it feared it would be "disastrous for the people of Cornwall".
